name: French Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or slow-cooking pot with browning unit, cook onions in butter until lightly browned.
2. Add the browned onions and butter to the pot along with the bouillon cubes, hot water, Worcestershire sauce, and salt.
3. Cover and cook on low for 4 to 6 hours.
4. Serve each bowl topped with toasted French bread sprinkled with grated Parmesan cheese.
Note: The recipe may be doubled and kept hot in the slow-cooking pot before serving.
